title: 美斯警告蘇亞雷斯要操返FIT

replies.msg:
Barcelona continued their fine start to the new season with a hard-fought 2-1 victory over Getafe yesterday.

Gaku Shibasaki struck for the home side but goals from Denis Suarez and Paulinho gave the Catalan giants all three points.

However, the day was not without its negatives with the performance of Luis Suarez a cause for concern.

The Uruguay forward has started the season badly - getting on the scoresheet just once - and Spanish outlet Don Balon claims that has left club talisman Lionel Messi concerned.

It is said the Argentina international was full of despair at the final whistle.

While Barcelona got the job done, Suarez’s form is effecting Messi’s state of mind.

The 30-year-old supposedly is aware of how the former Liverpool striker is struggling and he is desperately hoping he rediscovers his best form.

Messi’s own performances often depend on how those operate around him.
